kpis.name: Total Revenue
kpis.description: Total realized revenue across all channels and products

kpis.name: Revenue Growth YoY
kpis.description: Year-over-year revenue change

kpis.name: Gross Margin
kpis.description: Revenue minus cost of goods, as a percent of revenue

kpis.name: Operating Margin
kpis.description: Profitability after operating expenses

kpis.name: EBITDA
kpis.description: Earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation and amortization

kpis.name: Monthly Burn Rate
kpis.description: Average monthly cash outflow

kpis.name: Runway (Months)
kpis.description: Months of operation remaining at current burn

kpis.name: Customer Acquisition Cost
kpis.description: Average cost to acquire one new customer

kpis.name: Customer Lifetime Value
kpis.description: Predicted total revenue from a single customer

kpis.name: LTV / CAC Ratio
kpis.description: Healthy SaaS ratio is 3+

kpis.name: Days Sales Outstanding
kpis.description: Average days to collect receivables

kpis.name: Budget Variance
kpis.description: Actual vs planned spend; flag departments over 10%

kpis.name: Pipeline Value
kpis.formula: SUM(opportunity.amount WHERE stage NOT IN closed)
kpis.description: Total value of open opportunities

kpis.name: Win Rate
kpis.description: Percent of closed opportunities won

kpis.name: Average Deal Size
kpis.description: Average closed-won deal value

kpis.name: Sales Cycle Length
kpis.description: Average days from opportunity creation to close

kpis.name: Quota Attainment
kpis.description: Sales rep performance vs quota

kpis.name: Funnel Conversion Rate
kpis.description: Stage-by-stage conversion rates

kpis.name: Lead Response Time
kpis.description: Time from lead arrival to first sales touch

kpis.name: Annual Recurring Revenue
kpis.description: Total annualized contracted recurring revenue

kpis.name: ARR Growth Rate
kpis.description: Period-over-period ARR change

kpis.name: Net Revenue Retention
kpis.description: Best-in-class SaaS NRR is 110%+

kpis.name: Service Uptime
kpis.description: Percentage of time service is available

kpis.name: Mean Time To Recovery
kpis.description: Average time to recover from an incident

kpis.name: Mean Time Between Failures
kpis.description: Average operational period between failures

kpis.name: Throughput (per hour)
kpis.description: Operations completed per hour

kpis.name: Error Rate
kpis.description: Failed operations as a fraction of total

kpis.name: P95 Latency
kpis.description: 95th-percentile request latency

kpis.name: Inventory Turnover
kpis.description: How often inventory is sold and replaced

kpis.name: Capacity Utilization
kpis.description: Percent of total capacity in active use

kpis.name: Total Headcount
kpis.description: Active employee count

kpis.name: Attrition Rate (Annualized)
kpis.description: Annualized rate of employee departures

kpis.name: Voluntary Attrition
kpis.description: Departures initiated by the employee

kpis.name: Time to Hire (Days)
kpis.description: Average days from job requisition to first day

kpis.name: Offer Acceptance Rate
kpis.description: Percent of extended offers that are accepted

kpis.name: Employee Engagement Score
kpis.description: Average engagement survey score (1-5)

kpis.name: Training Hours per Employee
kpis.description: Average training hours per employee

kpis.name: Diversity %
kpis.description: Composition by self-identified group

kpis.name: Contractor Ratio
kpis.description: Contractors as a fraction of total workforce

kpis.name: Cost per Hire
kpis.description: All-in cost of hiring one employee

kpis.name: Net Promoter Score
kpis.description: Standard NPS computed from survey responses

kpis.name: CSAT Score
kpis.description: Average customer satisfaction score

kpis.name: Customer Churn Rate
kpis.description: Percent of customers leaving in a period

kpis.name: Revenue Churn
kpis.description: Lost ARR from cancellations and downgrades

kpis.name: First Response Time
kpis.description: Time to first reply on a support ticket

kpis.name: Resolution Time
kpis.description: Time from ticket open to resolution

kpis.name: Monthly Active Users
kpis.formula: COUNT(DISTINCT user_id WHERE event in last_30d)
kpis.description: Distinct users active in last 30 days

kpis.name: DAU/MAU Ratio
kpis.description: Daily-to-monthly active user ratio (stickiness)

kpis.name: Fraud Rate
kpis.description: Fraud losses as a fraction of transactions

kpis.name: False Positive Rate (Fraud)
kpis.description: False alerts as a fraction of total alerts

kpis.name: AML Alerts (open)
kpis.description: Anti-money-laundering alerts requiring review

kpis.name: Open Audit Findings
kpis.description: Outstanding audit issues

kpis.name: Security Incidents
kpis.description: High-severity security incidents this period

kpis.name: Feature Adoption Rate
kpis.description: Adoption of a specific feature

kpis.name: Release Frequency
kpis.description: Number of releases shipped per month

kpis.name: Lead Time for Changes
kpis.description: DORA metric — commit to production time

kpis.name: Change Failure Rate
kpis.description: DORA metric — failed deploys as % of total

kpis.name: Open Bugs (P0+P1)
kpis.formula: COUNT(bugs WHERE priority IN (P0,P1) AND status='open')
kpis.description: Outstanding high-priority bugs
